raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "cup",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The cup is reachable by the right arm and there is clear tabletop space to push it away from the boxes without colliding with either box; the push direction is chosen to increase clearance in front of box_1.",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is displaced to the front-right area of the table, no longer directly in front of the boxes, leaving a safer approach corridor to box_1."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Box_2 is reachable and the right end-effector can brace it from the outer (right) side without contacting box_1; this is needed because box_2 is attached_to box_1 and may move during pickup.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_2 is laterally braced by the right end-effector, reducing the chance that the attached pair shifts while box_1 is lifted."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "There is sufficient clearance on the left and front of box_1 for two end-effectors to form a wide lateral pinch around the box; cup is out of the way and box_2 remains stabilized to limit coupled motion from the attachment.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_1 is securely gripped by both end-effectors and lifted slightly above the tabletop, under full robot control (while managing the attachment forces with box_2)."
  } 
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The cup is reachable by the right arm and there is clear tabletop space to push it away from the boxes without colliding with either box; the push direction is chosen to increase clearance in front of box_1.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is displaced to the front-right area of the table, no longer directly in front of the boxes, leaving a safer approach corridor to box_1.

parsed_json.Precondition: Box_2 is reachable and the right end-effector can brace it from the outer (right) side without contacting box_1; this is needed because box_2 is attached_to box_1 and may move during pickup.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_2 is laterally braced by the right end-effector, reducing the chance that the attached pair shifts while box_1 is lifted.

parsed_json.Precondition: There is sufficient clearance on the left and front of box_1 for two end-effectors to form a wide lateral pinch around the box; cup is out of the way and box_2 remains stabilized to limit coupled motion from the attachment.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_1 is securely gripped by both end-effectors and lifted slightly above the tabletop, under full robot control (while managing the attachment forces with box_2).
